name: Tonight
detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before 9pm, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms likely between 9pm and 1am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 48. South wind 3 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
